title: ARKHE Ω-TEMP v6.7.0: Quantum Genomics and Polyglot Parsing Framework
description: Integrated ecosystem for quantum genomic intelligence (QNC, epigenetic operators, RADIX-2 synthetic genome) and universal code parsing (57 languages → UAST → transpilation). Includes Paper 91 manuscript, plugin documentation, interactive tutorials, and reproducible workflows.

creators.name: Sharma, Priya
creators.affiliation: Center for Synthetic Life, Indian Institute of Science
